name: Potato and Rice Soup (Patata e Risi)
recipeIngredient: 3 quarts Basic Broth (or canned chicken broth)
1 cup Arborio rice (or long-grain rice) (7 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and coarsely shred the carrots.
2. Peel and cut the potatoes into 1/2-inch dice. Grate the cheese (1 cup).
3. Heat the oil in a 6-quart soup kettle. Add the potatoes and sauté until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the carrots and tomato paste and cook until the carrots soften, about 3 minutes.
5. Cut the celery stalks in half and add to the kettle along with the broth and bay leaves. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer for 45 minutes, skimming occasionally.
6. Add the rice and simmer until tender, 18 to 20 minutes longer. Discard the celery and bay leaves.
7. Season with salt, if necessary.
8. Serve the soup in warm bowls, sprinkled with ground black pepper and cheese.
Makes 8 to 10 servings.
